global.description: The ad features a modern, abstract design with a focus on reassurance and action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to shop confidently with VaultRun.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Main visual element
elements.description: A central abstract shape that appears to be a combination of geometric forms, possibly representing a digital interface.

elements.label: Secondary visual element
elements.description: Another central abstract shape, similar to the first, but with a different configuration, enhancing the digital theme.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A large, soft-edged shape that serves as a background element, providing depth to the overall design.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: An overlay shape that adds complexity to the design, positioned centrally with a subtle contrast.

elements.label: VaultRun logo
elements.description: A simple, bold logo text that reads 'VaultRun', positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape located towards the bottom, adding a decorative touch to the layout.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold, prominent text stating 'Save with confidence Built for peace of mind', conveying reassurance.
elements.text_content: Save with confidence Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Headline text
elements.description: The headline text 'VaultRun' is large and eye-catching, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A clear and inviting button text 'Shop now' located at the bottom, encouraging user interaction.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, minimalist with bold typography, VaultRun, Save with confidence.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main message is centrally positioned, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: VaultRun, Save with confidence, Built for peace of mind, Shop now
